# Kairos · 周期天象图

Kairos is a public macro-cycle observatory.

Canonical site: https://kairos-atlas.com/
GitHub repository: https://github.com/nickzhuchen66/kairos-atlas

## What Kairos Is

Kairos organizes macro-cycle judgment into a public, clickable, reviewable, and falsifiable observatory.

Core concepts:

- Current Regime dashboard
- six-layer Cycle Stack
- Long Wave Atlas
- K6 Candidate Watch
- Watchlist and kill criteria
- curated public research briefs
- evidence-gated validation

## What Kairos Is Not

Kairos is not:

- a date oracle
- a trading signal system
- investment advice
- an automatic news feed
- a claim that K6 has been confirmed
- a claim that AI is confirmed K6

Watchlist items are observations, not confirmed facts.

K6 Candidate is manual, evidence-gated, and event-driven. Kairos does not use automatic news-flow updates or daily API polling to update K6 status.

## Public Resources

- Website: https://kairos-atlas.com/
- Roadmap: https://kairos-atlas.com/ROADMAP.md
- Contribution guide: https://kairos-atlas.com/CONTRIBUTING.md
- Open questions: https://kairos-atlas.com/research/OPEN_QUESTIONS.md
- Research index: https://kairos-atlas.com/research/README.md
- Public source registry guide: https://kairos-atlas.com/research/sources/README.md
- Public curated source registry: https://kairos-atlas.com/research/sources/public_source_registry.md

## Evidence Discipline

Kairos welcomes source-backed disagreement, source corrections, alternative periodization proposals, counterevidence, and website feedback.

Kairos does not treat AI-generated summaries as evidence. Public research should preserve source type, source hardness, claim-source mapping, evidence status, watch triggers, kill criteria, rejected overclaims, and remaining open questions.

The Public Curated Source Registry is the public evidence-link layer for Source Inspector panels and public research briefs. It is not the internal evidence workspace and does not expose raw Evidence Packs, private notes, source-repair work logs, or external-model search transcripts.

## Licensing

Kairos uses a split license model:

- website implementation code: MIT License
- Kairos content, research framing, names, copy, regime language, Watchlist wording, and Evidence Ledger language: all rights reserved

See: https://kairos-atlas.com/CONTENT_LICENSE.md
